checks.reason: The node is scoped to ancient written law-code collections, pinned to the Ur-Nammu law-code tradition around 2100 BCE.
A written law-code artifact requires writing by scope.
Classical/legal philosophy must not be laundered into the ancient written-code artifact scope.
Avoids a circular broad-field edge from legal systems to written law codes.
Ancient written law codes do not require the later classical currency node.
The current record_keeping node is early goods/accounting administration, not a source-backed direct prerequisite for written law codes.
